task.title: Deleting an alias
task.shortdesc: Deleting an alias deletes only the alias name from the catalog. It does not delete the referenced data set.

steps.stepsection: To delete a data set alias, do these steps:

step.cmd: Select the data set alias that you want to delete and click Delete.
To confirm the delete action, click Delete.
step.stepresult: A message window opens indicating that the referenced data set is not deleted.

step.cmd: Click OK to close the message window.
step.info: You can suppress the message window by clicking Don't show this again.

taskbody.result: When you delete a referenced data set, its alias entries are also removed from the catalog.
